name: research-companion
description: Strategic research thinking agents for brainstorming, idea evaluation, and project triage.

interface.shortDescription: Brainstorm, stress-test, and triage research directions
interface.longDescription: Research Companion helps researchers pick better problems before they spend months on them. It combines structured brainstorming, adversarial idea evaluation, and project-level strategy using Carlini-inspired tests for novelty, impact, timing, feasibility, and narrative strength.
defaultPrompt: Use $research-companion to brainstorm and pressure-test a new research direction.
Evaluate this research idea and tell me whether to pursue, refine, or kill it.
Help me decide whether to continue, pivot, or stop a struggling project.
